SEARCH
Package kp.trees

Class ConcurrentTrees

java.lang.Object
kp.trees.ConcurrentTrees
public class ConcurrentTrees extends Object
Researching Concurrent Trees.

Concurrent-Trees 2.6.0 API

  • RadixTree
    - known as PATRICIA trie or compact prefix tree
  • ReversedRadixTree
  • InvertedRadixTree
    - scanning for keywords in external documents
  • SuffixTree
    - known as PAT tree or position tree
  • PrettyPrinter
  • LCSubstringSolver
    - longest common substring solver

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    researchInvertedRadixTree()
    Researches the InvertedRadixTree.
    static void
    researchPrefixesAndSuffixesGenerator()
    Researches the ReversedRadixTree.

    Researches the RadixTree.
    static void
    researchReversedRadixTree()
    Researches the ReversedRadixTree.

    researchSolver()
    Researches the LCSubstringSolver.

    researchSuffixTree()
